name: simplified-cli
tagline: Publish to 10 platforms, generate AI images and videos — all from the command line
features: Create, schedule, queue, or draft posts
AI image generation (20+ models: Flux, Google Imagen, OpenAI, Recraft, Ideogram)
Image processing (remove background, upscale, generative fill, inpaint, outpaint)
Video processing (convert, merge, speedup, reverse, remove audio)
AI video generation from script or text prompt

envVars.name: SIMPLIFIED_API_KEY
envVars.description: Your Simplified API key from Settings → API Keys
